Bash(cd /c/Users/user/Downloads && python << 'EOPYTHON'
import openpyxl

try:
    # Load the workbook
    wb = openpyxl.load_workbook\('NI - DOCUMENTATION CHECKLIST.xlsx'\)
    
    # Get all sheet names
    sheets = wb.sheetnames
    print\("=" * 80\)
    print\("EXCEL FILE STRUCTURE"\)
    print\("=" * 80\)
    print\(f"Total sheets: {len\(sheets\)}"\)
    print\(f"Sheet names: {sheets}"\)
    print\(\)
    
    # Process each sheet
    for sheet_name in sheets:
        ws = wb[sheet_name]
        print\("=" * 80\)
        print\(f"SHEET: {sheet_name}"\)
        print\("=" * 80\)
        
        # Get dimensions
        print\(f"Dimensions: {ws.dimensions}"\)
        print\(\)
        
        # Read all data
        data = []
        for row in ws.iter_rows\(values_only=False\):
            row_data = []
            for cell in row:
                # Get cell value and any additional info
                value = cell.value
                row_data.append\(value\)
            data.append\(row_data\)
        
        # Print data in table format
        if data:
            # Print all rows
            for row_idx, row in enumerate\(data, 1\):
                print\(f"Row {row_idx}: {row}"\)
                print\(\)
        print\(\)
        
except Exception as e:
    print\(f"Error: {e}"\)
    import traceback
    traceback.print_exc\(\)
EOPYTHON)

Bash(/c/Users/user/AppData/Local/Programs/Python/Python312/python.exe << 'PYEOF'
import openpyxl

wb = openpyxl.load_workbook\(r'C:\\Users\\user\\Downloads\\NI - DOCUMENTATION CHECKLIST.xlsx', data_only=True\)
print\("=== SHEET NAMES ==="\)
print\(wb.sheetnames\)

for sheet_name in wb.sheetnames:
    ws = wb[sheet_name]
    print\(f"\\n{'='*80}"\)
    print\(f"SHEET: '{sheet_name}'"\)
    print\(f"Dimensions: {ws.dimensions}, Rows: {ws.min_row}-{ws.max_row}, Cols: {ws.min_column}-{ws.max_column}"\)
    print\(f"{'='*80}"\)
    
    # Print merged cells info
    if ws.merged_cells.ranges:
        print\(f"Merged cells: {[str\(m\) for m in ws.merged_cells.ranges]}"\)
    
    # Print all data
    for row in ws.iter_rows\(min_row=ws.min_row, max_row=ws.max_row, min_col=ws.min_column, max_col=ws.max_column, values_only=False\):
        row_data = []
        for cell in row:
            val = cell.value
            if val is not None:
                row_data.append\(f"[{cell.coordinate}] {repr\(val\)}"\)
        if row_data:
            print\(" | ".join\(row_data\)\)
PYEOF)
